nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, fc1.name AS primary_evaluator_name, fc2.name AS review_evaluator_name, b.code AS board_code
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc1 ON fc1.employee_id = ea.evaluator_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc2 ON fc2.employee_id = ea.assignment_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
WHERE  ea.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea.is_active = TRUE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM evaluation_attempt ea2 WHERE ea2.parent_attempt_id = ea.id AND ea2.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND ea2.is_active = TRUE)
  AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM evaluation_attempt ea2 WHERE ea2.parent_attempt_id = ea.id AND ea2.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND ea2.is_active = TRUE)
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.board_id, script_assignment.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
